scripts.build: npm -w @quarter-tone/core run build && npm -w @quarter-tone/audio run build
scripts.test: npm -w @quarter-tone/core run test && npm -w @quarter-tone/audio run test
scripts.test:coverage: npm -w @quarter-tone/core run test:coverage && npm -w @quarter-tone/audio run test:coverage
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @quarter-tone/core run typecheck && npm -w @quarter-tone/audio run typecheck
